editRules.contentRules: Add, delete, or edit technical information.|Update newer information (e.g., if there's a newer upgrade of the ProArt series).|Rewrite the 'Which monitor should I choose?' section to be more coherent and readable.
editRules.presentationRules: Format tables for better readability.|Separate important items into bullet points.|Adjust the final comparison section to have a clear conclusion.
editRules.languageRules: Transform text to a more professional tone (if used for blog/store).|Simplify or make it easier to understand if you use it for chatbot.
editRules.spellingRules: Example: at the end of the document you wrote 'bạk' → I can automatically delete or correct it.

products.askProductDetails: Please provide me with detailed information about product {sku}
products.dellP2425HIntroText: The Dell P2425H 23.8-inch monitor is an excellent choice for those looking for a high-quality monitor at an affordable price. Featuring an IPS panel for wide viewing angles and accurate colors, along with Full HD resolution (1920 x 1080) delivering sharp, detailed images.
products.impressivePerformanceText: With a 100Hz refresh rate, this monitor delivers a smoother viewing experience compared to standard 60Hz monitors. The 5ms response time ensures fast-moving scenes are displayed without blur. The monitor also supports 99% sRGB color gamut, allowing display of 16.7 million colors, delivering vibrant and realistic colors.
products.convenientDesignText: The Dell P2425H is designed with high flexibility, allowing height adjustment, tilt, left-right swivel, and 90-degree vertical rotation. The monitor is also VESA compatible, allowing you to easily mount the monitor on a stand or wall. Diverse connectivity ports include DisplayPort, HDMI, VGA, and multiple USB ports, fully meeting user connection needs.
products.eyeProtectionTechText: Equipped with ComfortView Plus technology and flicker-free, the Dell P2425H helps reduce harmful blue light and screen flickering, protecting eyes during long-term use.
products.documentPreviewInstruction: Document preview is only available for PDF and Office files (Word, Excel, PowerPoint)

about.title: About MMO Dashboard
about.subtitle: Your trusted partner for technology products and solutions

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: MMO Dashboard is dedicated to bringing you the latest and greatest in technology products. We carefully curate our selection to ensure you get only the best quality and value.
mission.commitment: Our commitment is to provide exceptional service, competitive prices, and expert guidance to help you make informed decisions about your technology purchases.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We stay at the forefront of technology trends to bring you cutting-edge products.

trust.title: Trust
trust.description: Building lasting relationships through transparency and reliability.

customer.title: Customer Focus
customer.description: Your satisfaction is our top priority in everything we do.

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: We partner only with reputable brands to ensure product excellence.

story.title: Our Story
story.paragraph1: Founded in 2020, MMO Dashboard began as a small team of technology enthusiasts with a vision to make quality tech products accessible to everyone.
story.paragraph2: What started as a modest online store has grown into a comprehensive technology hub, serving thousands of satisfied customers across the country.
story.paragraph3: Today, we continue to expand our product range and services, always keeping our customers' needs at the heart of everything we do.

cta.title: Ready to Explore?
cta.description: Discover our wide range of technology products and find exactly what you need.

blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: Stay updated with the latest tech news, reviews, and guides

post1.title: The Future of AI in Consumer Technology
post1.description: Exploring how artificial intelligence is reshaping the consumer tech landscape and what it means for everyday users.

post2.title: Dell XPS 15 2025: Complete Review
post2.description: An in-depth look at Dell's latest flagship laptop, testing performance, display quality, and overall value.

introduction.title: 1. Introduction
introduction.content: Welcome to MMO Dashboard. These terms and conditions outline the rules and regulations for the use of MMO Dashboard's Website.

acceptanceOfTerms.title: 2. Acceptance of Terms
acceptanceOfTerms.content: By accessing this website, we assume you accept these terms and conditions. Do not continue to use MMO Dashboard if you do not agree to take all of the terms and conditions stated on this page.

useOfWebsite.title: 3. Use of Website
useOfWebsite.content: You may use our website for lawful purposes only. You agree not to use the website:
useOfWebsite.item1: In any way that violates any applicable federal, state, local, or international law or regulation
useOfWebsite.item2: To transmit, or procure the sending of, any advertising or promotional material, including any 'junk mail', 'chain letter', 'spam', or any other similar solicitation
useOfWebsite.item3: To impersonate or attempt to impersonate the Company, a Company employee, another user, or any other person or entity
useOfWebsite.item4: In any way that infringes upon the rights of others, or in any way is illegal, threatening, fraudulent, or harmful

productInformation.title: 4. Product Information
productInformation.content: We have made every effort to display as accurately as possible the colors and images of our products that appear at the store. We cannot guarantee that your computer monitor's display of any color will be accurate.

pricing.title: 5. Pricing
pricing.content: All prices are listed in Vietnamese Dong (VND) and are subject to change without notice. We reserve the right to modify or discontinue any product without notice.

userAccounts.title: 6. User Accounts
userAccounts.content: When you create an account with us, you must provide us with information that is accurate, complete, and current at all times. You are responsible for safeguarding the password and for all activities that occur under your account.

privacy.title: 7. Privacy Policy
privacy.content: Your use of MMO Dashboard is also governed by our Privacy Policy. Please review our Privacy Policy, which also governs the Site and informs users of our data collection practices.

intellectualProperty.title: 8. Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.content: The Service and its original content, features, and functionality are and will remain the exclusive property of MMO Dashboard and its licensors. The Service is protected by copyright, trademark, and other laws.

disclaimer.title: 9. Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: The information on this website is provided on an 'as is' basis. To the fullest extent permitted by law, this Company excludes all representations and warranties relating to this website and its contents.

limitationOfLiability.title: 10. Limitation of Liability
limitationOfLiability.content: In no event shall MMO Dashboard, nor its directors, employees, partners, agents, suppliers, or affiliates, be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages.

governingLaw.title: 11. Governing Law
governingLaw.content: These Terms shall be governed and construed in accordance with the laws of Vietnam, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.

changes.title: 12. Changes to Terms
changes.content: We reserve the right, at our sole discretion, to modify or replace these Terms at any time. If a revision is material, we will provide at least 30 days notice prior to any new terms taking effect.

contact.title: 13. Contact Information
contact.content: If you have any questions about these Terms and Conditions, please contact us at:
